pageContext.name: The Book of Boba Fett™ Tusken Raiders™
pageContext.description: You can only get so far without a tribe.   Boba Fett was found in the desert of Tatooine after he escaped from the hungry maw of the Sarlacc™ pit and was taken prisoner by the Tusken Raider tribe. He worked hard to earn their trust, friendship, and loyalty, and over time, he became a member of their tribe. Boba Fett was taught to battle using a Gaderffii™ stick by a Tusken warrior, and in return, he taught them the fighting tactics he had learned during his time as a bounty hunter. The Book of Boba Fett™ – Tusken Raiders™ captures the bond forged between Boba Fett and his newfound family, highlighting some of the important moments that defined their relationship and set the course for Boba's future.  The Book of Boba Fett™ Collection presented by Thomas Kinkade Studios is a series of Limited Edition Art that captures iconic scenes from each chapter of the Star Wars™ live-action series. These lifelike works of art beautifully portray epic Star Wars stories and characters, combining the luminous techniques of Thomas Kinkade Studios with the signature style of the artist, Brian Rood.  Don't miss your chance to own The Book of Boba Fett™ Tusken Raiders art print. A truly beautiful addition to any Star Wars art gallery.
